title: Outstanding Award For HIAL Security Trai

sections.heading: Summary
sections.content:
“Outstanding” Award for HIAL Security Training Team. The security training team at HIAL have recently been awarded “Outstanding” in their assessment under the UK Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) Quality Assurance Framework.

Air Discount Scheme extension confirmed. The Scottish Government has confirmed that the Air Discount Scheme will be formally renewed from 1 April 2026 until at least 31 March 2027.

HIAL celebrates apprenticeship achievement supporting workforce development. Degree awarded as part of workplace based Graduate Apprenticeship Scheme for member of Dundee's airport team.

sections.heading: Context
sections.content: These developments affect aviation connectivity, airspace management, and surface access to airports. Readers interested in Scottish aviation heritage may find parallels in the industrial and operational history documented in our research volumes.
